xtce:Parameter.name: HK_GENERATED_TIMESTAMP
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: Sim time at HK packet generation

xtce:MetaCommand.name: ImagingSatCommand
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Header values common to all ImagingSat commands

xtce:MetaCommand.name: NOOP
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: No operation command for link verification

xtce:DefaultSignificance.reasonForWarning: Mode change affects all subsystem operations

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_POWER
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set power state of a subsystem

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_EXPOSURE
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set imager exposure time and gain

xtce:MetaCommand.name: ENABLE_BEACON
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Enable or disable autonomous beacon mode

xtce:MetaCommand.name: FILE_LIST
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Request listing of files in onboard storage

xtce:MetaCommand.name: FILE_DELETE
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Delete a file from onboard storage by name

xtce:MetaCommand.name: LOAD_ATS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Load an ATS file into the sequence scheduler

xtce:MetaCommand.name: ABORT_ATS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Halt ATS execution and clear sequence

xtce:MetaCommand.name: LOAD_RTS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Load an RTS file into the sequence scheduler

xtce:MetaCommand.name: ABORT_RTS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Halt RTS execution and clear sequence
